# A26,27-1 Block 및 A13-1,A14-1,B2-1 Block

Coverage note: PDF pp.251-256 continue the `A26,27-1 Block` / `판교휴먼시아 e-편한세상 (2공구)` turnkey material, covering community facilities and 101㎡, 117㎡, 154㎡, and 181㎡ unit types. PDF pp.257-260 begin the `PAN GYO HOUSING Competition A13-1,A14-1,B2-1 BLOCK` / `판교휴먼시아 힐스테이트 (3공구)` project.

## PDF p.251

![PDF page 251](../docs/pangyo-newtown-master-plan-design-book/assets/pages/pdf-page-251.jpg)

Project/plan notes:

- Upper project heading: `A26,27-1 Block`.
- Page section: `A26-1BL`.
- Main facility heading: `부대복리시설`.
- `계획의 주안점` notes central plaza and water-space linkage, concentrated community placement to strengthen resident harmony, open complex planning connected to residents inside/outside the complex and nearby school uses, and deck installation using site terrain with elevator-linked vertical circulation.
- `개념도` shows a plaza-oriented community concept with labels including 수변 및 도서관, 광장, 시설, 접근성/연계성, BUS BAY, 인근 주민, 주말활용, and 공공공지.
- `특화계획` describes using the complex slope for a 전망용 엘리베이터, connecting vertical movement and securing a view space.

Caption/image notes:

- Main drawings include `평면도` and `입면도` for welfare/community facilities.
- `커뮤니티센터` drawings include `1층 평면도`, `2층 평면도`, `정면도`, `우측면도`, and `입면도`.
- Dimension strings such as `27000`, `10000`, `4500`, and `8500` are visible in the community-center drawings but should be treated as drawing candidates.

## PDF p.252

![PDF page 252](../docs/pangyo-newtown-master-plan-design-book/assets/pages/pdf-page-252.jpg)

Project/plan notes:

- Page header: `판교휴먼시아 e-편한세상 (2공구)`.
- Block heading: `A27-1BL`.
- Facility heading: `보육시설 및 주민카페`.
- `계획의 주안점` says welfare/community facilities are concentrated around the plaza to induce resident community activation, and that a courtyard in the 경로당 brings natural daylight indoors for a pleasant interior environment.
- `개념도` shows 녹지, 시설, 접근성, 연계성, 광장, 수변, 주동활용, and surrounding movement/relationship arrows.
- Lower facility heading: `경로당 및 주민공동시설`.

Caption/image notes:

- Childcare/resident cafe drawings are labeled `2층 평면도`, `1층 평면도`, and `정면도`.
- Senior/community facility drawings are labeled `경로당 2층 평면도`, `경로당 및 주민공동시설 1층 평면도`, `좌측면도`, `정면도`, `우측면도`, and `경로당 입면도`.
- Visible dimension candidates include `19500`, `27000`, `11000`, `13400`, `7600`, and `15200`.

## PDF p.253

![PDF page 253](../docs/pangyo-newtown-master-plan-design-book/assets/pages/pdf-page-253.jpg)

Project/plan notes:

- Left unit heading: `101A㎡ Intelligent Gallery`.
- 101A concept text: a space with convenience and artistic sensibility; maximized daylight/ventilation; multipurpose balcony formed with the rear balcony.
- 101A plan variants: `확장형` and `기본형`.
- 101A rear-balcony note: `후면 발코니 계획`; use as a shared residential space to strengthen family ties, and possible mini-garden introduction using the vestibule.
- 101A interior note: `인테리어계획`; simple and refined spatial feeling.
- Right unit heading: `101B㎡ 30대 초반 부부`.
- 101B concept text describes a male-centered household with young children; the husband enjoys pop-art pictures and collecting cars, miniatures, and plastic models; the home visibly reflects traces of children.
- 101B plan variants: `확장형` and `기본형`, with note `다락방 포함세대 / 다락방 계단실위치`.
- 101B interior note: display space for husband and child; `White Tone / 재생 Wood / 거울 활용`.

Visible table:

| Unit | 전용면적 | 주거공용 | 분양면적 |
|---|---:|---:|---:|
| 101A㎡ | 101.90㎡ | 25.27㎡ | 127.17㎡ |

Caption/image notes:

- 101B interior images are captioned `Living Room`, `Furniture`, and `Kitchen & Dinning`.
- Drawing dimension candidates include `16,370` on the 101B expanded plan and multiple smaller room-width strings; smaller labels are visually dense.

## PDF p.254

![PDF page 254](../docs/pangyo-newtown-master-plan-design-book/assets/pages/pdf-page-254.jpg)

Project/plan notes:

- Left unit heading: `154㎡ Well Being Together`.
- 154㎡ concept text: a space where health, peace, and rest are felt; duplex household plan strengthens private-space functions; household-only terrace introduces detached-house qualities; two-story window plan maximizes daylight; children and couple zones are separated.
- 154㎡ plan variants: `확장형` and `기본형`.
- 154㎡ interior note: consideration for varied family compositions.
- Right unit heading: `181㎡ Zen Garden`.
- 181㎡ concept text: a space with eastern dignity and depth; household-only terrace with detached-house atmosphere; maximized natural daylight/ventilation; three-generation family plan securing independence between Master-Zone and Sub-Master Zone.
- 181㎡ plan variants: `확장형` and `기본형`.
- 181㎡ rear-balcony note: placed facing the entry to secure openness and provide a `Buffer Zone`.
- 181㎡ interior note: main space for successful older adults; dining that conveys a well-tended garden and the flavor of daily life.

Visible tables:

| Unit | 전용면적 | 주거공용 | 분양면적 |
|---|---:|---:|---:|
| 154㎡ | 154.03㎡ | 40.51㎡ | 194.54㎡ |
| 181㎡ | 181.18㎡ | 45.41㎡ | 226.69㎡ |

Caption/image notes:

- Both unit sections include `Color Concept` material boards and interior reference images.
- 181㎡ plan includes a visibly large terrace/garden zone on the right side of the expanded plan.

## PDF p.255

![PDF page 255](../docs/pangyo-newtown-master-plan-design-book/assets/pages/pdf-page-255.jpg)

Project/plan notes:

- Left unit heading: `117A㎡ 40대 초반 부부`.
- 117A concept text describes a woman-centered household with a middle-school daughter; the wife is interested in well-being, collects flowerpots, and grows herbs; the family enjoys travel and keeps many nature-oriented photos of sky, trees, and historic remains.
- 117A plan variants: `확장형` and `기본형`, with note `다락방 포함세대 / 다락방 계단실 위치`.
- 117A interior note: kitchen planned around the wife's circulation; recycled materials used.
- Right unit heading: `117B㎡`.
- 117B plan variants: `확장형` and `기본형`, also noting `다락방 포함세대 / 다락방 계단실 위치`.
- 117B interior note repeats: kitchen planned around the wife's circulation; recycled materials used.

Caption/image notes:

- 117A image captions include `Living Room (Artwall)`, `Furniture`, and `Kitchen & Dinning`.
- 117B image captions include `Kitchen & Dinning` and `Living Room`.
- Drawing dimension candidates include `11,060` and `16,620` around the 117A expanded plan, and `12,580` and `19,670` around the 117B expanded plan.

## PDF p.256

![PDF page 256](../docs/pangyo-newtown-master-plan-design-book/assets/pages/pdf-page-256.jpg)

Project/plan notes:

- Left unit heading: `117C㎡ Working at Home`.
- 117C unit-plan notes: Master Zone is strengthened for use as auxiliary room space; a two-sided open living room supports natural daylight and views.
- 117C plan variants: `확장형` and `기본형`.
- 117C interior note: consideration for productive space use such as open indoor `Home Working` and `Home Study`.
- Right unit heading: `117D㎡ 50대 중반 부부`.
- 117D lifestyle text describes a professor family with college-age children; the couple has strong Korean identity and likes East Asian painting, ink painting, and calligraphy; visible collecting interests include tea/tea ware and ceramics; the son is interested in jazz and the daughter studies fashion design.
- 117D plan variants: `확장형` and `기본형`, with note `다락방 포함세대 / 다락방 계단설치 위치`.
- 117D interior note: Korean solid-wood furniture and floor-seating atmosphere; daughter's room includes illustrative elements.

- Drawing dimension candidates include `18,730` and `12,450` around the 117D expanded plan.

## PDF p.257

![PDF page 257](../docs/pangyo-newtown-master-plan-design-book/assets/pages/pdf-page-257.jpg)

Project/plan notes:

- New project heading: `PAN GYO HOUSING Competition A13-1,A14-1,B2-1 BLOCK`.
- Constructor line: `현대건설/한신공영/반도건설`.
- Firm: `(주)무영 종합건축사사무소`.
- Visible participant names: 안길원, 김영우, 김기백, 정미숙, 김성준, 최석용.
- The text defines two central themes: the apartment complex as an urban/nature-harmony landscape called `Panorama-Ring`, and the row-house complex as a nature-connected ecological complex called `Eco-Ring`.
- Apartment-site strategy: open arrangement from major urban viewpoints toward the foothill edge, securing views toward 금토산; a broad central plaza supports pleasant site environment; tower-type blocks toward the mountain slope and slab-type blocks along 생활가로 respond to the city.
- Row-house strategy: uses natural inflow and creates `Living Community`; site layout accepts urban flow naturally; creates ecological experience grounds extending from 금토산; four themed courtyards support community within the complex.

Caption/image notes:

- Bottom diagrams are labeled `외부공간 조성`, `블루 네트워크`, and `그린 네트워크`.
- Small diagram labels include `솔숲쉼터`, `유실수체험장`, `자연초화원`, and `Green`.

# 판교신도시 건축계획안 - A13-1, A14-1, B2-1 Block

Coverage note: PDF pp.261-270 document `A13-1, A14-1, B2-1 Block`, also labeled on alternating pages as `판교휴먼시아 힐스테이트 (3공구)`. The batch is mostly perspective renderings, physical-model photos, site-plan key maps, community/open-space diagrams, and two visible `분양개요` tables.

## PDF p.261

![PDF page 261](../docs/pangyo-newtown-master-plan-design-book/assets/pages/pdf-page-261.jpg)

### A13-1, A14-1, B2-1 Block

#### 다양한 경관과 커뮤니티

- 4개의 테마를 갖는 중정형 공간.
- 성격이 다른 커뮤니티 가로계획.

Small concept plan labels include English community themes such as `Living Community`, `Green Community`, and `Eco Community`; nearby Korean callouts are visually small but indicate entry/community and residential movement spaces.

#### 자연생태습지

- 보존산림습지를 이용한 생태단지계획.
- 육생비오톱, 수생비오톱, 목논 등 계획.

#### Figure

Full-page rendered view of high-rise residential towers with blue roofs around a large green central open space and pond, backed by wooded hills. The upper strip includes two small concept diagrams for community scenery and ecological wetland planning.

## PDF p.262

![PDF page 262](../docs/pangyo-newtown-master-plan-design-book/assets/pages/pdf-page-262.jpg)

### 단지와 자연이 어우러짐

- 주변자연의 적극적 유입.
- 자연환경 유입으로 그린네트워크 형성.

#### Rendered Views

- Upper image: bird's-eye night rendering of residential towers arranged around a winding open-space/water network.
- Bullets under the image:
  - 넓은 광장을 중심으로 위계있는 외부공간 조성.
  - 생태수로의 시·종점을 따라 친수공간계획.
  - 산록변 타워형 배치로 자연 유입을 강조하는 배치 계획.
  - 통경축을 고려하여 자연으로 열린경관 조성.
- Lower image: street-level residential perspective with tower blocks, central green space, flowering trees, and wooded hills beyond.

## PDF p.263

![PDF page 263](../docs/pangyo-newtown-master-plan-design-book/assets/pages/pdf-page-263.jpg)

### A13-1, A14-1, B2-1 Block

This page is a collage of physical-model photographs. It shows several massing views of the block, including:

- High-rise towers placed along curved pedestrian/open-space spines.
- Lower-rise perimeter and courtyard housing groups.
- A repeated yellow/gold circulation band or community street running through the blocks.
- Road edges, crosswalks, plazas, and clustered residential courtyards visible in model form.

No separate table or explanatory paragraph is visible on this page beyond the block title.

## Stats Candidates

- Project/block names: `A13-1, A14-1, B2-1 Block`; `판교휴먼시아 힐스테이트 (3공구)`.
- Community/open-space concepts: 4 themed courtyard spaces, differentiated community streets, preserved forest wetland, terrestrial and aquatic biotopes, rice-paddy/wetland elements, ecological waterway, waterside central plaza, ecological learning yard.
- PDF p.268 distribution: 101A 21, 101B 19, 101C 18, 101D 18, 101E 18, 101F 105, 101G 29, 101A1 42, 115A 45, 115B 58, 115A1 54, 118 164, 150A 3, 150B 3, 150C 2, 150D 1, 150E 1, 180A 4; total 605 households.

- Design principles visible on p.267 and p.269: Geumtosan view preservation, separation of daily circulation and leisure circulation, road-noise buffer zones, south-facing layout orientation, daylight and open-sky views.

## Validation Notes

- Source images `pdf-page-261.jpg` through `pdf-page-270.jpg` were reviewed visually; OCR or image-to-text automation was not used.
- The batch is image-heavy. Full-page renderings and model photos were described by visible content and captions rather than inferred design intent.
- Small labels inside site plans, model photos, and some inset renderings are visually dense. Major captions, headings, bullets, and the two readable distribution tables were captured; unclear micro-labels were not guessed.
- On PDF p.268 and p.270, the `분양개요` tables are white text on a dark rendering background. The type labels and household counts were manually read from the page images and should be rechecked against a higher-resolution source if publication-grade numeric precision is required.

---

# 턴키 프로젝트 - 판교휴먼시아 힐스테이트/푸르지오 블록계획 및 단위평면

Coverage note: visual review of PDF pp.271-280 only. This batch covers A13-1/A14-1/B2-1 block amenity planning, apartment and townhouse unit/interior concept boards, and the opening pages for the A9-1/A9-2/A10-1/B4-1 block `판교휴먼시아 푸르지오` 4공구 turn-key project.

## PDF p.271

![PDF page 271](../docs/pangyo-newtown-master-plan-design-book/assets/pages/pdf-page-271.jpg)

### A13-1, A14-1, B2-1 Block

#### A13-1BL (아파트)

Inset map labels identify `근린생활시설`, `생활체육시설`, and `부대복리시설`.

- `건강과 여가활동을 누구나 쉽게 즐길 수 있도록 샤워시설과 운동시설(휘트니스, 골프연습장)이 연계되어 있어 사용이 용이하고 효율적으로 구성`
- `실내는 친환경 자연소재인 목재와 화강석을 사용하여 전체적으로 밝고 따뜻한 느낌의 심플한 디자인으로 계획`

Visible figure captions:

- `체육시설 평면도`
- `부대복리시설 입면도`

The fitness plan includes labeled rooms such as shower/changing areas, fitness, golf practice, sauna-related rooms, and a central hall/connection zone. The elevation drawing shows an arched lower level, upper amenity mass, stair/elevator tower, and material callouts.

#### B2-1BL (연립주택)

Inset map labels identify `부대복리시설` and `근린생활시설`.

- `단지 주보행로와 광장의 연계점에 배치하여 커뮤니티 시설 이용의 활성화를 유도하는 계획`
- `생활가로변과 단지 내에서의 입체적 접근이 가능하며 인지성을 고려한 입면계획`

Visible figure captions:

- `부대복리시설 지하1층 평면도`
- `부대복리시설 지상1층 평면도`

Readable room labels include `요가`, `샤워실`, `탈의(남)`, `탈의(여)`, `주민카페`, `홀`, `운동`, and sauna/spa-related spaces; small service-room labels are visually dense.

### PAN GYO HOUSING Competition

- `(주)해안 종합건축사사무소` - `윤세한`

#### NEO FOREST

- `통경축 및 보행축`: `통경축으로 열린 시야를 확보하고 보행자의 시각을 고려한 스카이라인 계획`
- `운중천`: `운중천의 조망을 극대화하고 천변을 적극적으로 이용하기 위한 배치계획`

- `커뮤니티 Route`: `커뮤니티 HUB에서 단지중심으로 이어지는 Route에 커뮤니티시설 설치`
- `진출입 마당`: `보행이 많을것으로 예상되는 지점에 보행자를 위한 단지 진입구 설치`
- `조망`: `세봉산과 금토산 및 운중천의 조망을 적극 고려`

Main concept map labels include `GREEN VIEW`, `중앙광장`, `커뮤니티 HUB`, `커뮤니티 ROUTE`, `통경축`, `운중천`, `초등학교`, `저류지`, `복리시설`, `단독주택용지`, and `Bus Bay`. Legend items shown: `중앙광장`, `진입마당`.

## Key Figures And Tables

- PDF p.271: A13-1BL apartment fitness/community facility plan and elevation; B2-1BL townhouse welfare facility basement/ground plans.
- PDF p.272: A14-1BL 생활체육/복지시설 plan and multiple neighborhood/welfare facility elevations.
- PDF pp.273-276: unit and interior concept boards for 101㎡, 115㎡, 150㎡, 180㎡ apartments and 125㎡/150㎡ townhouses.
- PDF p.277: `NEO FOREST` concept map showing `GREEN VIEW`, `커뮤니티 HUB`, `커뮤니티 ROUTE`, central plazas, approach yards, and view/open-space axes.
- PDF p.278: `판교휴먼시아 푸르지오` 4공구 summary table for A9-1, A9-2, A10-1, and B4-1BL plus large physical model photo.
- PDF p.279: A9-1BL planning diagrams and `분양개요` table.
- PDF p.280: A9-2BL plan/model image and `분양개요` table.

## Stats Candidates

- A9-1/A9-2/A10-1/B4-1BL project table on p.278: 5, 7, 6, and 6 buildings respectively; visible household counts 494, 588, 202, and 64; site areas 25,484㎡, 31,294㎡, 17,961㎡, and 14,846㎡.
- A9-1BL `분양개요` on p.279 totals `486세대` across 84A/84B/84C/101/116A/116B/116C/150A/150B/180A/180B types.
- A9-2BL `분양개요` on p.280 totals `567세대` across 84A/84B/84C/101A/101B/116/150/151/180A/180B types.
- Visible FAR values on p.278: A9-1 `239.91%`, A9-2 `239.94%`, A10-1 `156.99%`, B4-1BL `74.53%`.
- Visible building coverage ratios on p.278: A9-1 `12.20%`, A9-2 `12.21%`, A10-1 `11.48%`, B4-1BL `19.08%`.
- Interior/unit themes in pp.273-276: `Self-Expression`, `New Korean`, `French Classic`, and `Newly Nobility`; type/area labels include `101㎡`, `115㎡`, `125㎡`, `150㎡`, and `180㎡`.

## Validation Notes

- Reviewed visually from `pdf-page-271.jpg` through `pdf-page-280.jpg`; OCR and image-to-text automation were not used.
- All ten assigned pages have source markers and image links.
- The page range spans two project groupings: pp.271-276 continue `판교휴먼시아 힐스테이트 (3공구)` material, while pp.277-280 introduce `판교휴먼시아 푸르지오 (4공구)` / `PAN GYO HOUSING Competition`.
- Dense room labels, dimension strings, and dark model-plan microtext were captured only when legible; unclear microtext was summarized as plan/figure content rather than guessed.
- The p.278 project summary table and pp.279-280 `분양개요` tables were transcribed as visible. Their totals differ by page context, so both visible values are preserved without reconciliation.

# 판교휴먼시아 푸르지오 (4공구): A9-1, A9-2, A10-1, B4-1 Block

Coverage note: PDF pp.281-290 cover the later design pages for `A9-1,A9-2,A10-1,B4-1 Block`, including site-planning diagrams, sales/unit mix notes, landscape sequence, nightscape concept, community hub/route planning, and themed garden/open-space design for the 4th construction section of `판교휴먼시아 푸르지오`.

## PDF p.281

![PDF page 281](../docs/pangyo-newtown-master-plan-design-book/assets/pages/pdf-page-281.jpg)

### Key Visual/Text Content

- Header: `A9-1,A9-2,A10-1,B4-1 Block`.
- Sub-block label: `A10-1BL`.

  - `A10-1BL / 2호파상형` - `'자연속 생동감의 빛'`: `자연이 만들어낸 무한한 변화를 느낀다`.
  - `A10-1BL / 2호파상형` - `'깊은 자연속 고요함의 빛'`: `따스한 햇살이 스며든 깊은 숲속의 평온함에 조용히 기대어 본다`.
  - `B4-1BL` - `'조용히 잠들어있는 자연의 빛'`: `달빛이 조용한 밤하늘을 비추고 숲엔 반딧불의 움직임을 느낀다`.
- Section heading: `야간경관 세부계획`.
- Detailed lighting themes:
  - `'긴 여정의 빛'`: `모든 생명의 쉼터를 비추는 빛`.
  - `'자연으로 회귀의 빛'`: `모든 생명이 모이는 쉼터를 비추는 빛`.
  - `'자연속 생동감의 빛'`: `강한 생명의 길을 비추는 빛`.
  - `'조용히 잠들어 있는 자연의 빛'`: quiet nature illuminated by moonlight and firefly-like movement.
  - `'깊은 자연 속 고요함의 빛'`: `고요한 산책로를 비추는 빛`.

- PDF p.287: Four garden themes: `觀水園`, `萬疊花園`, `常綠園`, `夢遊園`.
- PDF p.287: Eight landscape scenes (`1景` through `8景`) are organized across the four garden themes.
- PDF p.288: Three design themes: `Theme.1 고품격 주거단지 조성`, `Theme.2 친환경 주거단지 조성`, `Theme.3 커뮤니티 시설 특화`.

## Validation Notes

- Reviewed visually from `pdf-page-281.jpg` through `pdf-page-290.jpg`; no OCR tools or image-to-text automation were used.
- This batch appears to remain within `판교휴먼시아 푸르지오 (4공구)` and `A9-1,A9-2,A10-1,B4-1 Block` across all ten pages.
- Several plan, section, and rendering annotations are printed at very small size or on dark backgrounds; these are summarized where legible and marked as visually dense where uncertain.
- Place-name caption on PDF p.284 visually appears as `세능산`; verify against a higher-resolution source before indexing it as a named place.
- The Chinese-character theme names are recorded as visually read from the page; `萬疊花園` should be verified if exact typography matters.
- Printed footer folios differ from PDF page markers; this file uses PDF page numbers as required by the guide.

# PDF pages 291-300: 판교휴먼시아 푸르지오 4공구 and 데시앙 5공구

Coverage note: this batch visually reviews PDF pp.291-300 from rendered page images. It covers the close of the 판교휴먼시아 푸르지오 4공구 material for A9-1, A9-2, A10-1, and B4-1 blocks, unit/interior boards for multiple area types, and the opening pages for the 판교휴먼시아 데시앙 5공구 / A6-1 Block turnkey proposal.

  - `B4-1BL`

## PDF p.297

![PDF page 297](../docs/pangyo-newtown-master-plan-design-book/assets/pages/pdf-page-297.jpg)

### PAN GYO HOUSING Competition: A6-1 BLOCK

- Main heading: `PAN GYO HOUSING Competition`.
- Project title: `A6-1 BLOCK`.
- Consortium/project names: `태영건설/KCC건설/우미토건`.
- Design-office credits:
  - `(주)SIAPLAN 건축사사무소` with names visible as `조주환 / 정구수`.
  - `종합건축사사무소 명승건축(주)` with names visible as `이효주 / 이명원`.

#### Concept Summary

- The proposal states that the plan has two main characteristics.
- First, it actively accepts the surrounding `Nature` and `Urban` environments into the site and seeks harmonious integration. The text describes developing new residential-building types for each environmental condition. Landscape-view-oriented blocks are placed along the complex edge to maximize views, sunlight, and privacy, while wind paths are guided for a comfortable environment. In more urban cluster areas, view-corridor-responsive buildings create an urban environment within nature.
- Second, existing terrain and ecology are preserved and used, with community spaces planned around open spaces generated by site level differences. These spaces are intended to support varied outdoor activity and a lively residential landscape.
- The stated aim is a nature-friendly landscape apartment community where nature, city, and people harmonize, and where the plan enables a `코하우스 커뮤니티`.

#### Bottom Diagrams

- `CONTEXT` diagram with labels including `URBAN`, `NATURE`, `경관조망형 주동`, and `통경축대응주동`.
- `OPEN SPACE` diagram with `Natural open space` and `URBAN (Community) open space`.
- `COMMUNITY` diagram showing clustered building groups and circulation/community nodes; small labels are visually dense.

# A6-1 Block, 판교휴먼시아 데시앙 및 A7-2/6공구 프로젝트

Coverage note: PDF pp.301-308 continue the A6-1 Block / 판교휴먼시아 데시앙(5공구) material, covering outdoor environment planning, community/support facilities, and unit/interior concepts. PDF p.309 introduces the PAN GYO HOUSING Competition A7-2 Block entry, and PDF p.310 opens the 판교휴먼시아 아너스빌 6공구 턴키 프로젝트 with project statistics and a site rendering.

## PDF p.301

![PDF page 301](../docs/pangyo-newtown-master-plan-design-book/assets/pages/pdf-page-301.jpg)

Top heading: `A6-1 Block`.

Visible planning heading: `옥외 환경계획`.

Subheading: `녹지 인입 및 산림생태계`.

Readable diagram labels include:

- `완충수림대`
- `징검다리효과`
- `발코니녹화`
- `주변 생태기반과 연계된 식재계획`
- `필로티를 통한 소통`

The main image is a dark-background physical model view of tall residential towers arranged around a central open-space/landscape system. Two smaller model photos below show the same tower cluster from alternate aerial angles, emphasizing the ring-like open space, tree lines, and surrounding roads/water/green corridors.

## PDF p.302

![PDF page 302](../docs/pangyo-newtown-master-plan-design-book/assets/pages/pdf-page-302.jpg)

Top ecology diagrams include labels such as `소형비오톱`, `수생비오톱`, `관찰데크`, `자연형 호안`, `진디블록`, and a microclimate-control note.

Left rendering/bullet group:

- `백운산으로부터 이어지는 자연의 흐름을 단지내로 유도`
- `단지내 실개천을 계획하여 친수공간 확보`
- `넓은 잔디마당을 형성하여 단지내에서 자연을 느끼도록 함`
- `옥외커뮤니티 활성화로 공동체생활 구현`

Right rendering/bullet group:

- `서판교와 백운산을 이어주는 스카이라인의 형성` (first place-name is visually small but appears to reference 서판교)
- `중심생활가로와 근린공원의 연계로 활력의 중심이 되도록 함`
- `통경축을 중심으로 생활가로를 형성하여 주구중심으로 연계`
- `서판교를 대표하는 랜드마크적인 역할`

Additional visuals include daytime and night tower renderings, small landscape sketches, a skyline/elevation-like tower image, and an aerial view of the landscaped central space.

Visible footer: `03 판교신도시 건축계획안 300 | 301`.

## PDF p.303

![PDF page 303](../docs/pangyo-newtown-master-plan-design-book/assets/pages/pdf-page-303.jpg)

Top heading: `A6-1 Block`.

Main headline: `진정한 자연친화형 경관아파트의 새로운 기준 설계`.

Readable concept statements:

- `전세대 남향위주 배치 및 조망권 극대화` - 4Bay 남향위주의 배치로 일조, 채광, 조망권을 극대화하고 프라이버시 확보.
- `커뮤니티 활성화를 위한 중앙광장` - 옥외 커뮤니티 활성화로 다양한 외부 활동 연출.
- `아름다운 야간 경관조명의 단지설계` - 야간 조명설계로 밤에도 단지 내외부에서의 경관조명이 아름다운 단지 구현.
- `바람길을 고려한 단지 배치` - 바람의 원활한 흐름 및 유입을 고려한 과학적인 단지배치로 쾌적한 주거환경 제공.

The full-page rendering shows tall apartment towers with `Humansia`, `DESIAN`, and `데시앙` branding on tower faces, set against a mountain/sky backdrop with ground-level landscaping and pedestrian activity.

## PDF p.304

![PDF page 304](../docs/pangyo-newtown-master-plan-design-book/assets/pages/pdf-page-304.jpg)

- `2층 평면도`

- `A Type` and `B Type` for the 115㎡ unit group.

Plan headings:

- `복2층`

## PDF p.309

![PDF page 309](../docs/pangyo-newtown-master-plan-design-book/assets/pages/pdf-page-309.jpg)

Project heading: `PAN GYO HOUSING Competition`.

Main title: `A7-2 BLOCK`.

Partner/company line: `경남기업/서희건설`.

Design office and credited names:

- `(주)삼우 종합건축사사무소`
- `이형일 / 김동기 / 강동완 / 김은비`

Readable narrative text:

`본 계획의 가장 큰 특징으로 단지는 자연의 흐름에 순응하고 오픈스페이스와 마을안길로 조성되는 환경적 커뮤니케이션(Environmental Communication) 조성을 주요개념으로 한다. 자연, 인간, 문화가 일체화된 생활공동체로서 주거단지를 지향하며, 계획기법 역시도 자연의 프로세스를 따르는 것을 원칙으로 하였다.`

`환경적 커뮤니케이션은 주거단지내에서 일상적으로 일어나는 커뮤니케이션으로, 테마형 오픈스페이스와 커뮤니티 시설을 유기적으로 연계함으로써 형성된다. 보행, 비오톱, 문화의 이동통로와 같은 마을의 안길이 커뮤니티시설과 오픈스페이스를 연결한다. 이러한 시스템은 커뮤니티센터-상가-관리사무소가 집적되는 통합 커뮤니티시스템으로 확장된다.`

`2개의 물, 2개의 숲, 그리고 혈은 전체단지를 조성하는 중심공간으로 자연으로 열리고 자연을 받아들이는 개방형 클러스터링을 조성하며, 마을의 중심을 비워 마을 주민을 위한 시설을 조성하였다. 이러한 환경적커뮤니케이션의 기저에는 도시 및 자연요소가 유기적으로 공존할 수 있는 테마화된 클러스터를 기본으로 한다. 그린테라스(숲+테라스형 주거), 옐로우스퀘어(흙+진입마당), 화이트데크(바람+도시형 주거)를 테마로 클러스터를 형성한다.`

Bottom concept-sequence captions:

- `보전지의 선정`
- `핑거그린(녹지의 유입)`
- `두개의 숲 그리고 혈`
- `그린데크(마을안길) 조성`

## Key Figures And Tables

- A6-1 / 판교휴먼시아 데시앙 (5공구) pages include outdoor environment concepts, community-center/support-facility planning, neighborhood-living retail planning, and unit/interior concept pages for `84㎡`, `101㎡`, `115㎡`, `150㎡`, and `180㎡`.
- Unit/interior concept names visible in this batch include `부부중심형`, `커뮤니티 강화형`, `공간 효율형`, and `경관 중시형`; the 84㎡ page also prints `Elegance Romantic Classic`.
- A7-2 Block project page lists `경남기업/서희건설`, with `(주)삼우 종합건축사사무소` and names `이형일 / 김동기 / 강동완 / 김은비`.
- A7-2 concept themes include `Environmental Communication`, `그린테라스(숲+테라스형 주거)`, `옐로우스퀘어(흙+진입마당)`, and `화이트데크(바람+도시형 주거)`.
- 판교휴먼시아 아너스빌 6공구 턴키 프로젝트 table: 아파트 12동, 지하 3층, 지상11~18층, 총 492세대, 대지면적 39,775.0㎡, 건축면적 7,614.82㎡, 연면적 102,514.147㎡, 건폐율 19.14%, 용적률 173.85%.

## Validation Notes

- Visual review only. No OCR or image-to-text automation was used.
- Page images reviewed: `pdf-page-301.jpg` through `pdf-page-310.jpg`.
- Dense floor-plan room labels, material callouts, and dimension strings on pp.304-308 were recorded only where readable; many micro labels are intentionally summarized rather than guessed.
- The p.310 `연면적` value appears visually as `102,514.147㎡`; the printed parenthetical components are recorded exactly as visually read.
- Korean and English headings/captions were preserved where legible, including project names, company names, plan type labels, and major statistics.

# A7-2 Block / 판교휴먼시아 아너스빌

Coverage note: PDF pages 311-316 document the A7-2 Block design for 판교휴먼시아 아너스빌 (6공구), including residential-type concepts, cluster courtyards, green and ecological landscape concepts, entry/landscape views, and community facilities. PDF pages 317-320 present unit-plan and interior-concept sheets for 101㎡, 115㎡, 153㎡, and 184㎡ homes.

## PDF p.311

![PDF page 311](../docs/pangyo-newtown-master-plan-design-book/assets/pages/pdf-page-311.jpg)

### A7-2 Block

#### 주거의 유형

Sketch labels visible across the top:

- "테라스형(경사지)"
- "부착형(통형포함)" (small parenthetical text is slightly soft)
- "복층형"
- "펜트하우스"
- "Skip Floor"

The page combines a large dark presentation model/site plan with four model-photo captions on the left:

- "우드데크"
- "단지입구 에코타워 전경"
- "중앙광장"
- "내부 통경축"

The main plan shows a curving pedestrian/deck spine, tower and lower-rise housing clusters, multiple circular nodes, green courts, and water/landscape pockets. Fine labels inside the dark model plan are visually dense and not reliable at page-image resolution.

## PDF p.312

![PDF page 312](../docs/pangyo-newtown-master-plan-design-book/assets/pages/pdf-page-312.jpg)

### 판교휴먼시아 아너스빌 (6공구)

- Upper-right project title: "판교휴먼시아 아너스빌 (6공구)".
- Concept sketch caption: "클러스터 중정".
- Main rendering caption: "중앙광장 야경투시도".
- Lower band shows a night landscape/elevation view of residential towers and lighting.

Visible design narrative, summarized from the paragraph:

- The complex is described as part of the natural landscape, with low cluster organization intended to preserve surrounding mountain scenery and views.
- The village-center plaza is integrated with center-community functions.
- A community center is placed at the village's central point, compared with the traditional logic of placing a pavilion.
- Internal view corridors and walking paths are opened for hikers and neighboring residents.
- Warm nightscape lighting is planned to create a cozy nighttime atmosphere and social connection among residents.

## PDF p.313

![PDF page 313](../docs/pangyo-newtown-master-plan-design-book/assets/pages/pdf-page-313.jpg)

### A7-2 Block

#### Green 개념

Sketch labels visible:

- "타운하우스"
- "생태조망형"
- "베란다 돌출형"

The central perspective shows A7-2 Block embedded in wooded slopes, with high-rise towers, townhouse/low-rise buildings, a looping pedestrian spine, water channels, circular plazas, and planted open spaces. Three smaller renderings at the bottom show landscape views of towers, ecology/water gardens, and the central green/circular plaza. Small handwritten diagram notes are visually dense.

## PDF p.314

![PDF page 314](../docs/pangyo-newtown-master-plan-design-book/assets/pages/pdf-page-314.jpg)

### 판교휴먼시아 아너스빌 (6공구)

#### 입면스케치

- Top elevation sketch caption: "입면스케치".
- Mid-page rendering captions:
  - "단지내부를 관통하는 통경축"
  - "도롱뇽 생태공원 전경"
- Lower rendering caption: "경관 입면".

Visible design narrative, summarized:

- Each differentiated cluster has its own courtyard and supports cluster-level community.
- The plan preserves the salamander habitat and adds decks for views to create practical relationships with the natural setting.
- The overall skyline is intended to maximize a rhythm that evokes the surrounding mountain form.
- The drawings emphasize visual corridors, an ecological pond/park, and mountain-backed residential elevations.

## PDF p.315

![PDF page 315](../docs/pangyo-newtown-master-plan-design-book/assets/pages/pdf-page-315.jpg)

### A7-2 Block

#### 접지층 단면 개념

Top sketch labels visible:

- "접지형"
- "솔래 H." or similar short label (partially unclear)
- "낙수"

#### 배치개념

- The left concept drawing maps a site organization with slope/forest/water-edge conditions, view arrows, and cluster placement.
- The right sketch presents an aerial massing concept with towers and lower housing organized along a central spine.

Visible design narrative:

- The site is divided according to ground character into "산록조망형", "생태자원형", "수변조망형", and "도시경관형" clusters.
- An eco-tower is planned as a landmark at the complex entrance.
- Greenhouses are installed every three floors, supporting small-scale resident community within the residential buildings and expressing an ecological design concept.

The bottom images show nighttime model/rendering views of the illuminated site circulation and tower elevations.

## PDF p.316

![PDF page 316](../docs/pangyo-newtown-master-plan-design-book/assets/pages/pdf-page-316.jpg)

### 판교휴먼시아 아너스빌 (6공구)

#### Community Facilities

#### 커뮤니티 센터

- A "KEY MAP" locates the community-center area within the site.
- The large plan drawing includes community and childcare/support spaces. Legible room labels include "주민휴게", "보육시설1", "보육시설2", "보육시설3", and "유아놀이터"; smaller labels and dimensions are dense.

#### 통합커뮤니티 시스템

- "커뮤니티시설 - 상가 - 관리사무소의 집적을 통한 커뮤니티 기능의 향상과 활성화 유도"

#### 생태마을 특화시설

생태학습장:

- "도롱뇽 서식지와 연계된 체험 교육장을 설치"
- "필요시 주민 연회장으로 활용"

마을홍보관:

- "주진입구 및 통경축과 근접하여 설치"
- "생태마을 홍보 및 주민휴게 기능"

#### 고품격 커뮤니티 시설

- "지침면적의 200% 확보"
- "수요분석에 의한 선호 커뮤니티 시설의 충분한 면적 확보로 쾌적한 환경 제공"

#### 근린생활시설

- Lower plan shows neighborhood-living/commercial units with labels "상점-6", "상점-7", "상점-8", "상점-9", "상점-10", plus "2층출입구".
- Dimension strings and small construction annotations are visually dense.

## PDF p.317

![PDF page 317](../docs/pangyo-newtown-master-plan-design-book/assets/pages/pdf-page-317.jpg)

### 101B㎡ Fresh Breeze / 101E㎡ Fresh Breeze

Both 101㎡ plan panels use the tagline "봄기운 스며 싱그러운 우리집.." and describe an environmentally oriented, natural/trendy style using natural materials, modern lines, and motif patterns from soil or plant stems.

#### 101B㎡ Fresh Breeze

- Plan types shown: "확장형", "기본형", "가변형".
- Main plan labels include living room, kitchen, rooms, bathrooms, and balcony areas; exact dimension chains are present but dense.

#### 101E㎡ Fresh Breeze

- Plan types shown: "확장형", "기본형", "가변형".
- Expanded type has a curved/rounded living-room edge.

#### Interior Images

- Bottom-left caption: "Natural하면서도 Trendy한 공간".
- Bottom bullet themes include:
  - natural color use
  - contact/view toward nature
  - indirect lighting creating a soft and cool feeling
- Bottom-right image repeats the natural/trendy living-room concept, with a rounded form and panorama-style view noted; small overlay text is partially soft.

## PDF p.318

![PDF page 318](../docs/pangyo-newtown-master-plan-design-book/assets/pages/pdf-page-318.jpg)

### 115A㎡ Moderate Breeze / 153A㎡ Gentle Breeze

#### 115A㎡ Moderate Breeze

- Tagline: "모카향 그윽한 우리집.."
- Concept text emphasizes comfortable brown tones, refined richness, "Rich & Sensual Style", mocha/cream color, and modern-line variation.
- Plan types shown: "확장형", "기본형", "가변형".

#### 153A㎡ Gentle Breeze

- Tagline: "관조의 미가 있는 우리집.."
- Concept text emphasizes a "Mix & Match Style" where different cultures and styles combine, with modern forms/colors and exotic decorative elements.
- Plan types shown: "확장형", "기본형", "가변형".

#### Interior Images

- Bottom-left caption: "풍부한 미적감각과 세련미가 있는 공간".
- Bottom-left bullets mention mocha/cream rich color, a deluxe decorative living-room expansion, and two-sided open-view living room.
- Bottom-right caption: "Noble한 품격과 다양한 감성이 있는 공간".
- Bottom-right bullets mention vertical uplift and two-sided open view, simple/heavy spatial expression through two decorative art walls, and use of East Asian image materials/patterns.

## PDF p.319

![PDF page 319](../docs/pangyo-newtown-master-plan-design-book/assets/pages/pdf-page-319.jpg)

### 115D㎡ 파노라마뷰의 원형거실 / 115C㎡ 자연이 스며드는 대청마루

#### 115D㎡ 파노라마뷰의 원형거실

- Concept text: a circular living room maximizes views toward the surrounding mountain foothills, and the linear corridor is used as a gallery space.
- Plan types shown: "확장형" and "기본형".
- A callout marks "다락방 포함세대 다락방 계단설치위치".
- Bottom image caption: "원형의 거실을 통해 산록변으로의 파노라마 View 향유".

#### 115C㎡ 자연이 스며드는 대청마루

- Concept text includes "대청마루형 거실", a bathroom with waterfront view, townhouse-like living space, and a kitchen facing a village path.
- Plan types shown: "확장형" and "기본형".
- A callout again marks "다락방 포함세대 다락방 계단설치위치".
- Bottom image caption: "복도의 선형공간의 장점을 Gallery로 계획하고 산록으로의 조망 확보".

## PDF p.320

![PDF page 320](../docs/pangyo-newtown-master-plan-design-book/assets/pages/pdf-page-320.jpg)

### 184A㎡ 하늘과 가까운 누마루 / 184B㎡ 확장된 하늘 정원

#### 184A㎡ 하늘과 가까운 누마루

- Concept text: high-ceiling living room and differentiated architectural space; living room, outdoor terrace, and numaru space are connected sectionally.
- Plan types shown: "확장형" and "기본형".
- Bottom-left interior image caption: "Corner Open 창호를 통해 욕실안에 자연이 관입되게 계획".

#### 184B㎡ 확장된 하늘 정원

- Concept text: flexible space planning supports a two-generation separated residence; family room and deck create a house with a broad yard-like space.
- Plan types shown: "확장형" and "기본형".
- Bottom-right interior-image overlay text is very dark and partially unreadable, but it appears to describe an expanded living-room/interior concept.

## Validation Notes

- Visual review only. No OCR tools, image-to-text automation, or embedded-text extraction were used.
- Opened and reviewed page images `pdf-page-311.jpg` through `pdf-page-320.jpg`.
- Source marker and image link are included for every page in the assigned range.
- Readable project names, headings, captions, plan-type labels, unit areas, facility notes, and quantitative facts were captured.
- Dense model-plan labels, tiny room/dimension strings, and dark overlay text in interior photos were summarized or marked as visually dense rather than guessed.
- Only this assigned batch file was created for the transcription scope.

# 민간사업 프로젝트 And 판교신도시 개발 현황

Coverage note: PDF p.321 is a transitional design-book end card. PDF pp.322-328 introduce and summarize `민간사업 프로젝트`, including March public-sale and rental private projects. PDF pp.329-330 shift to `판교신도시 개발 현황`, with land-development overview statistics and block-by-block housing construction status.

This mostly blank page contains a small grayscale architectural image and the English title `PAN-GYO Master Plan & Design Book`. It functions as a visual closing/transition page before the next project section.

Transition note: this is the last private-project block sheet in this batch. The next page changes from private-project presentation to current development-status reporting.
